Class GTNetMessageContext

java.lang.Object
grafiosch.gtnet.handler.GTNetMessageContext
public class GTNetMessageContext extends Object
Context object containing all information needed for GTNet message processing. Provides a clean API for handlers to access message data, entity references, and utility methods without requiring direct injection of multiple dependencies. The context is created once per incoming message and passed to the handler.
See Also:
  • for the handler interface using this context

  • Constructor Details

    • GTNetMessageContext

      public GTNetMessageContext(GTNet myGTNet, GTNet remoteGTNet, MessageEnvelope request, List<GTNetMessageAnswer> autoResponseRules, tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper objectMapper)
      Creates a new message context.
      Parameters:
      myGTNet - the local GTNet configuration (this server)
      remoteGTNet - the remote GTNet configuration (may be null for first handshake from unknown domain)
      request - the incoming message envelope
      autoResponseRules - list of auto-response rules for this message type, ordered by priority (may be empty)
      objectMapper - Jackson ObjectMapper for payload conversion

  • Method Details

    • getMyGTNet

      public GTNet getMyGTNet()
      Returns the local GTNet configuration representing this server.

    • getRemoteGTNet

      public GTNet getRemoteGTNet()
      Returns the remote GTNet configuration. May be null for first handshake requests from unknown domains, where the remote GTNet entity doesn't exist yet in the local database.

    • getRequest

      public MessageEnvelope getRequest()
      Returns the incoming message envelope.

    • getSourceDomain

      public String getSourceDomain()
      Returns the source domain name from the request.

    • getMessageCodeValue

      public byte getMessageCodeValue()
      Returns the raw message code byte value.

    • getParams

      public Map<String, GTNetMessage.GTNetMessageParam> getParams()
      Returns the message parameters map.

    • getParamValue

      public String getParamValue(String key)
      Returns the value of a specific parameter by key.
      Parameters:
      key - the parameter key
      Returns:
      the parameter value as String, or null if the parameter doesn't exist

    • getMessage

      public String getMessage()
      Returns the optional text message from the request.

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns the request timestamp.

    • getIdSourceGtNetMessage

      public Integer getIdSourceGtNetMessage()
      Returns the source message ID from the remote system (for reply correlation).

    • getReplyToSourceId

      public Integer getReplyToSourceId()
      Returns the ID of the local request message that this response is replying to. For response messages only. This allows linking an incoming response to the original request that was sent from this server.

    • getAutoResponseRules

      public List<GTNetMessageAnswer> getAutoResponseRules()
      Returns the list of auto-response rules configured for this message type, ordered by priority.
      Returns:
      list of GTNetMessageAnswer rules, empty list if no auto-response is configured

    • hasAutoResponseRules

      public boolean hasAutoResponseRules()
      Checks if auto-response rules are configured for this message type.

    • getPayload

      public tools.jackson.databind.JsonNode getPayload()
      Returns the raw JSON payload from the request.

    • hasPayload

      public boolean hasPayload()
      Checks if the request contains a payload.

    • getPayloadAs

      public <T> T getPayloadAs(Class<T> clazz)
      Converts the JSON payload to the specified class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      clazz - the target class for deserialization
      Returns:
      the deserialized payload object
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if payload is null or conversion fails

    • getParamsAs

      public <T> T getParamsAs(Class<T> clazz)
      Converts the message parameters to the specified POJO class.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      clazz - the target class for conversion
      Returns:
      the converted POJO

    • getObjectMapper

      public tools.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper getObjectMapper()
      Returns the ObjectMapper for custom serialization needs.

    • getVisibility

      public byte getVisibility()
      Returns the visibility level for the message.
      Returns:
      the visibility byte value (0 = ALL_USERS, 1 = ADMIN_ONLY)

    • setHandlerData

      public void setHandlerData(String key, Object value)
      Stores handler-specific data for passing state between template method steps. This allows handlers to share data between processRequestSideEffects, applyResponseSideEffects, and buildResponse without instance fields (handlers are singletons).
      Parameters:
      key - the data key
      value - the data value

    • getHandlerData

      public <T> T getHandlerData(String key, Class<T> clazz)
      Retrieves handler-specific data stored during processing.
      Type Parameters:
      T - the target type
      Parameters:
      key - the data key
      clazz - the expected type
      Returns:
      the stored value cast to the expected type, or null if not found
